description: Tackle bouldering walls and roped routes at Münster's climbing gym — great year-round.
groupSuitability: Suitable for individuals, couples, and small groups

locationInfo.description: Modern bouldering and lead-climbing walls suitable for all skill levels, from complete beginners to advanced climbers.
safetyTips: Complete safety briefing before first visit
Wear appropriate climbing shoes
Spot your partner on bouldering walls

description: Test your balance and core strength on a stand-up paddleboard on the Aasee.

locationInfo.lighting: Open water with good natural light
locationInfo.description: The calm, shallow waters near the Aasee south shore are ideal for paddleboarding beginners.
safetyTips: Wear a leash and life jacket
Avoid strong wind conditions
Stay within the designated area

description: Cool off on a hot day at one of Münster's outdoor swimming facilities.

locationInfo.description: Münster's main outdoor pool with multiple swimming lanes, slides, and sunbathing areas.
safetyTips: Follow lifeguard instructions
Apply sunscreen generously
Never swim alone in open water

description: Start your day with a gentle morning walk along the canal paths and lakeside promenade.

locationInfo.lighting: Open towpath — good light from early morning
locationInfo.description: A flat, traffic-free canal towpath stretching several kilometres north of Münster city centre.
safetyTips: Watch for cyclists on the shared path
Wear layers — mornings can be chilly
Keep dogs on leads near water

description: Stroll along the harbour or lakeside to enjoy Münster's evening golden hour.

locationInfo.description: The converted industrial harbour is Münster's trendiest evening destination — cafes, art, and waterside views.
safetyTips: Stay on the designated pedestrian areas
Watch children near the water edge
Busy at weekends — allow extra time

description: A refreshing jog along the scenic Aasee lake path, ideal for clearing your head.

locationInfo.description: A 7 km paved ring around the Aasee lake, flat and popular with joggers year-round.
safetyTips: Watch for cyclists sharing the path
Wear reflective gear in low light
Stay hydrated

description: Explore Münster on two wheels along its famous Promenade ring or riverside paths.

locationInfo.description: A 4.5 km tree-lined ring encircling the old city, beloved by cyclists and pedestrians alike.
safetyTips: Yield to pedestrians
Follow cycling direction signs
Lock bikes at official stands

description: Trek through forested trails on the outskirts of Münster and breathe in the fresh air.
groupSuitability: Great for individuals, couples, or small groups

locationInfo.lighting: Low lighting under tree canopy — bring a torch in winter
locationInfo.description: A network of well-marked trails through mixed woodland on the western edge of Münster.
safetyTips: Wear sturdy footwear
Inform someone of your route
Carry a charged mobile phone
